2605.17279.title: Rover: Context-aware Conflict Resolution with LLM
2605.17279.paper_summary: Code merging is a significant challenge, particularly in large-scale projects. Existing solutions, including program analysis and machine learning, show promise but face critical limitations. Program analysis lacks the ability to infer developers' intentions, relying on conservative strategies that offload unresolved conflicts for manual handling. Meanwhile, model-based approaches struggle with conflicts involving complex code dependencies due to insufficient contextual awareness. To address these gaps, we introduce Rover, a novel conflict resolution system that integrates program analysis with large language models (LLMs). To obtain context-aware prompts, we propose Multi-layer Code Property Graph (MtCPG), a new representation capturing inter-file dependencies and enabling contextual analysis for a given conflict. Using graph connectivity algorithms, Rover further clusters conflicting code and associated changes into meaningful "contexts" that guide the LLM in generating accurate resolutions. We compared Rover with standalone LLMs, machine learning baseline MergeGen, and suggestion provider tool WizardMerge with adjacent code as the contexts. Evaluation results show that Rover surpasses all of these approaches in terms of conflict resolution, achieving higher similarity to ground-truth resolutions at character, lexical, and semantic levels.
2605.17279.paper_summary_zh: 程式碼合併是一項重要挑戰，特別是在大型專案中。現有的解決方案，包括程式分析和機器學習，顯示出潛力，但面臨關鍵限制。程式分析缺乏推斷開發者意圖的能力，依賴保守的策略將未解決的衝突轉交手動處理。與此同時，基於模型的方法在處理涉及複雜程式碼依賴的衝突時，由於缺乏足夠的上下文意識而面臨困難。為了解決這些問題，我們介紹了Rover，一個新穎的衝突解決系統，將程式分析與大型語言模型（LLMs）整合在一起。為了獲得具上下文意識的提示，我們提出了多層程式碼屬性圖（MtCPG），這是一種新的表示法，捕捉檔案間的依賴關係，並使得對特定衝突的上下文分析成為可能。使用圖連通性演算法，Rover進一步將衝突的程式碼和相關變更聚類為有意義的「上下文」，以指導LLM生成準確的解決方案。我們將Rover與獨立的LLM、機器學習基線MergeGen和建議提供工具WizardMerge進行比較，並將相鄰程式碼作為上下文。評估結果顯示，Rover在衝突解決方面超越了所有這些方法，在字元、詞彙和語義層面上達到與真實解決方案更高的相似度。
2605.17279.author: Qingyu Zhang et.al.
2605.17279.authors: Qingyu Zhang, Junzhe Li, Jiayi Lin, Changhua Luo, Chenxiong Qian
